overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk game showing a character walking through a downtown city street with modern glass architecture, crossing an intersection, and entering a traditional Asian-inspired covered market with red lanterns and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: green sports car drives past the crosswalk on the street
character steps up onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving across the intersection from right to left
pedestrian in white shirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: curved corner building with green-tinted windows and red base
sleek green sports vehicle parked at the curb
wide pedestrian crossing with yellow diagonal lines
massive concrete overpass spanning across the street
tall glass tower with reflective facade rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a futuristic city intersection with a green glass office building on the right and a modern skyscraper visible in the distance. A green sports car drives past as the character walks across the yellow-striped crosswalk and steps onto the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

events.description: large concrete support column temporarily blocks view of the street
character navigates past standing pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with red bandana standing on the sidewalk
pedestrian in white tank top walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: massive structural pillar with orange bands supporting the overhang
dark concrete ceiling of the overhead structure providing shade
building entrance with wooden panels and red architectural accents

segments.scene_description: Walking under the building overhang along the concrete sidewalk, the character passes large support columns and other pedestrians. The modern skyscraper remains visible to the left while the traditional market facade appears ahead, marking the transition from the open street to the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Asian market entrance with hanging red lanterns

events.description: entering the covered market area with distinct traditional architectural style
moving into darker interior space illuminated by artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone gateway into the covered market interior

notable_agents.action: figure standing in the doorway of the market entrance

entered.detail: large stone pillars with traditional architectural capitals marking the entrance
cluster of hanging red spherical lanterns suspended from the ceiling
illuminated red and blue neon sign above the market entrance
dark wooden ceiling structure with exposed beams and hanging lights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the traditional market through a stone gateway adorned with red paper lanterns. The neon 'DORAYA' sign illuminates the entrance as the character moves from the diffused natural light into the darker, artificially lit interior corridor with wooden beam ceilings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, futuristic city intersection into the atmospheric depths of a traditional covered market. It begins as the character crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk past a green glass office building and a passing sports car, moving toward a concrete sidewalk. As the character walks under a building overhang, the open street gives way to a sheltered walkway lined with large support columns and pedestrians, while a modern skyscraper remains visible in the distance. The scene then shifts as the character approaches a stone gateway, transitioning from diffused natural light into a darker interior. Finally, the camera passes under red paper lanterns and a glowing neon DORAYA sign, entering a corridor defined by wooden beam ceilings and artificial illumination.
